episodes.title: Spirit Science: The Internets Insane Cult
episodes.description:
You all voted for it, so here it is! The insane world of Spirit Science! 

Spirit Science Quiz: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdTxxnrIJqQZM1ngLrQIL2G6GO2f3E2GMToDIfwOkC1qrIQJw/viewform?usp=publish-editor

Lon Lon Ranch - LOZ: Ocarina of Time
Simian Segue - Donkey Kong Country
Redd's ship - Animal Crossing New Horizons

Gerudo Valley - LOZ: Ocarina of Time
That there song 'bout them horse bits - Pepper Coyote
Egmont Overture Finale - Kevin MacLeod
Birthplace of All Life - E.V.O. The Search For Eden
Mother Earth - E.V.O. The Search For Eden

Windy & Co. - Conkers Bad Fur Day

Fizaal's Happy Haven - Star Trek TNG: Futures Past
Pursuit - Phoenix Right Ace Attorney 
Logic and Trick - Phoenix Right Ace Attorney
Trial - Phoenix Right Ace Attorney
